title: Paul Forber
extract: Paul Forber (born 29 April 1964) is an English former rugby league footballer who played as a second-row or prop in the 1980s and 1990s. He spent most of his career with St Helens, making almost 250 appearances in 11 seasons at the club. He also spent several seasons with Salford before finishing his career with Workington Town and Rochdale Hornets.
